default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy sprint standup to discuss account progress and share process improvements for creating client artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/R-39xkB2xoxhf7ggyK3TTt9qjYHtK4V8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel developed a new process for efficiently creating high-quality client artifacts using AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/R-39xkB2xoxhf7ggyK3TTt9qjYHtK4V8?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Account progress updates: Augment (good progress), GetPod (artifacts redone), Town (Aida to lead), Engine (Joe to lead)](https://fathom.video/share/R-39xkB2xoxhf7ggyK3TTt9qjYHtK4V8?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [CodeLibrary.ai is getting traction; needs optimization and more content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/R-39xkB2xoxhf7ggyK3TTt9qjYHtK4V8?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Biologica kickoff materials are prepared; meeting scheduled for this week](https://fathom.video/share/R-39xkB2xoxhf7ggyK3TTt9qjYHtK4V8?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

## Topics

### Account Updates

  - [**Augment**: Good progress; need to align on priorities with SIL. Action: Schedule meeting for Wednesday at 9 am.](https://fathom.video/share/R-39xkB2xoxhf7ggyK3TTt9qjYHtK4V8?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [**GetPod**: Artifacts redone for migration. Aida to select an assignment and create an introduction in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/R-39xkB2xoxhf7ggyK3TTt9qjYHtK4V8?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [**Town**: Aida to lead. Tasks include creating artifacts, following up on kickoff, scheduling meetings, and setting up week 1-2 deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/R-39xkB2xoxhf7ggyK3TTt9qjYHtK4V8?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [**Engine**: Joe to lead. Focus on generating different voice options and sharing previous work.](https://fathom.video/share/R-39xkB2xoxhf7ggyK3TTt9qjYHtK4V8?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [**Biologica**: Agenda set and shared. Highly competitive space with strong competitors. Consider suggesting link-building strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/R-39xkB2xoxhf7ggyK3TTt9qjYHtK4V8?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)

### CodeLibrary.ai Progress

  - [Getting clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/R-39xkB2xoxhf7ggyK3TTt9qjYHtK4V8?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Needs optimization and more content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/R-39xkB2xoxhf7ggyK3TTt9qjYHtK4V8?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Plan to make an announcement on LinkedIn this week (approved by Augment)](https://fathom.video/share/R-39xkB2xoxhf7ggyK3TTt9qjYHtK4V8?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Action: Marcel to coordinate with engineering for allocation and improvements](https://fathom.video/share/R-39xkB2xoxhf7ggyK3TTt9qjYHtK4V8?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)

### Process Improvement for Artifacts

[Marcel demonstrated a new process for creating client artifacts:](https://fathom.video/share/R-39xkB2xoxhf7ggyK3TTt9qjYHtK4V8?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)

1.  Use Perplexity AI for deep research on the company
2.  Generate quotes, reviews, and user testimonials
3.  Identify authors with relevant writing styles
4.  Use Claude AI to create company overviews, audience profiles, and writing guidelines
5.  Refine and edit the AI-generated content for accuracy and relevance

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule Augment meeting for Wednesday at 9 am](https://fathom.video/share/R-39xkB2xoxhf7ggyK3TTt9qjYHtK4V8?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Aida to select GetPod assignment and create introduction in Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/R-39xkB2xoxhf7ggyK3TTt9qjYHtK4V8?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Joe to lead on Engine, Aida to lead on Town account management](https://fathom.video/share/R-39xkB2xoxhf7ggyK3TTt9qjYHtK4V8?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
